description: create new app to demonstrate controlling the LEDs of the MIDI controller AKAI APCmini mk2 . Technical documentation for the device is @notes/AKAI APCmini mk2.md . Create an UI similiar to @apps/launchpad_mk1_demo . An illustration of the device will react to input and output for pads, controls and sliders .  Allow the user to choose to connect to MIDI via the browser or socketcluster server.
